gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed benchmark executor provenance, flagged plan mutation and wrapper-hook compatibility issues, and reported Clean after fixes.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_benchmark_plan_executor.py tests/test_databricks_job.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
GPT-5.5 review clean after resolving plan mutation and public-wrapper hook findings
what_changed: Added benchmark plan execution and source-provenance record types to command-plan execution summaries.
Recorded plan path, driver path, byte size, SHA-256, suite/model/hardware fields, and command count for local and Databricks-managed benchmark plan runs.
Ensured the CLI hashes the exact plan payload used for execution while preserving public-wrapper monkeypatch compatibility for the JSON-plan executor.
why: Release operators need to prove which benchmark plan JSON a managed AWS g5 Databricks run executed before collecting benchmark, storage, and engine-probe evidence.
